allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Get-Module -ListAvailable PSScriptAnalyzer\)\) { Install-Module PSScriptAnalyzer -Scope CurrentUser -Force -AcceptLicense -ErrorAction Stop } ; \(Get-Module -ListAvailable PSScriptAnalyzer | Select-Object -First 1\).Version)

PowerShell(Install-Module Pester -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -AllowClobber -MinimumVersion 5.0 -ErrorAction Stop; \(Get-Module -ListAvailable Pester | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).Version)

PowerShell(& powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Install-Module Pester -Scope CurrentUser -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -MinimumVersion 5.0 -ErrorAction Stop; Import-Module Pester -MinimumVersion 5.0; Invoke-Pester -Path .\\tests\\ -Output Minimal" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell($errs=$null; [void][System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\('C:\\_Projects\\lucent-job-luScreen\\luscreen-docs\\run.ps1', [ref]$null, [ref]$errs\); if \($errs.Count\) { $errs | Format-List Message,Extent | Out-String } else { 'PARSE OK' }; ""; "=== PS 5.1 parse check ==="; & powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "& { `$errs=`$null; [void][System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\('C:\\_Projects\\lucent-job-luScreen\\luscreen-docs\\run.ps1', [ref]`$null, [ref]`$errs\); if \(`$errs.Count\) { `$errs | Format-List Message,Extent | Out-String } else { 'PARSE OK' } }")

PowerShell(try { pwsh -NoProfile -Command "& '.\\luscreen-docs\\run.ps1' prereqs" } catch {}; pwsh -NoProfile -Command "& { try { & '.\\luscreen-docs\\run.ps1' prereqs } catch { Write-Host \(`"ERROR: `" + `$_.Exception.Message\) -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host `$_.ScriptStackTrace -ForegroundColor DarkRed } }" 2>&1)
